{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Sadesthenes’ From Rising Sun to Setting Moon
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Sadesthenes’ From Rising Sun to Setting Moon]] is a book.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
